metadata.description: Claude skills for web research, CVE enumeration, Reddit discussions, Glassdoor reviews, and LinkedIn job searching

plugins.name: web-research
plugins.description: Tiered web search and page fetching using free tools first, then paid fallbacks

plugins.name: reddit-research
plugins.description: Search Reddit and retrieve full thread content including comments and upvotes

plugins.name: glassdoor-research
plugins.description: Pull company reviews, ratings, and interview experiences from Glassdoor

plugins.name: linkedin-job-search
plugins.description: Search LinkedIn for job listings, retrieve JDs, and triage against a configurable profile

plugins.name: cve-researcher
plugins.description: Pull and analyse CVEs from NVD API + CISA KEV, with optional VulnCheck cross-reference
